name: Santa Fe Trail Beef & Bean Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef, onion, and green pepper in a heavy skillet until no longer pink.
2. Stir in the string beans and tomato soup; mix well.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Bake for 30 minutes.
4. In a separate bowl, combine salt, pepper, and mashed potatoes with the eggs, stirring until combined.
5. Spread the potato mixture evenly over the casserole in a baking dish.
6. Return to the oven and bake for an additional 15 to 20 minutes or until heated through.
